---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What does the current behavior make hard or impossible?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. API sketches, references to similar features elsewhere, or a rough design are all welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about, and why they fall short.

## Additional context

Data scale, performance constraints, or anything else relevant.
